moments.title: Wimbledon Heats Up
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships are in full swing at the All England Club, with singles matches progressing to the third round today and the finals set for next weekend.

angles.name: Centre Court Buzz
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are flying as Wimbledon 2026 hits the third round! Who are you backing for the singles titles this year?

angles.name: Weekend Watch
angles.copy: It's a big weekend at Wimbledon! The road to the finals is getting serious. Tune in for all the action.

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: The biggest tennis tournament in the world is happening right here in London! Who's your local favourite to go all the way at Wimbledon?

moments.title: Mumford & Sons Headline BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: Folk-rock favourites Mumford & Sons are headlining American Express presents BST Hyde Park today, July 4th, as part of London's major summer concert series.

angles.name: Live in London
angles.copy: Mumford & Sons are bringing their anthemic folk-rock to Hyde Park tonight! Who's there for the singalongs?

angles.name: Folk-Rock Friday
angles.copy: It’s a massive night for folk-rock as Mumford & Sons take over BST Hyde Park! What's your favourite track to hear live?

moments.title: Duran Duran at BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: New Wave icons Duran Duran will headline American Express presents BST Hyde Park tomorrow, July 5th, with support from Scissor Sisters and Nile Rodgers & Chic.

angles.name: 80s Legends Live
angles.copy: Get ready to dance! Duran Duran, Scissor Sisters, and Nile Rodgers & Chic are hitting BST Hyde Park tomorrow. Pure pop perfection!

angles.name: Hyde Park Throwback
angles.copy: Duran Duran are bringing the hits to Hyde Park this Sunday. Who's excited for a dose of iconic 80s cool in the capital?

moments.title: Pitbull Takes Over BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: Mr. Worldwide, Pitbull, will bring his high-energy show to American Express presents BST Hyde Park on Friday, July 10th, with Kesha also on the bill.

angles.name: Party Starter
angles.copy: Pitbull is hitting Hyde Park next Friday, July 10th! Get ready for a massive party with Mr. Worldwide and Kesha.

angles.name: Hyde Park Dance
angles.copy: Next Friday, Hyde Park is going to be bouncing! Pitbull and Kesha are bringing the ultimate summer vibes to BST.

moments.title: Lewis Capaldi Closes BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: Scottish superstar Lewis Capaldi will close out American Express presents BST Hyde Park with two headline shows on Saturday, July 11th and Sunday, July 12th.

angles.name: Capaldi Weekend
angles.copy: Lewis Capaldi is bringing his incredible voice to close BST Hyde Park next weekend, July 11th & 12th! Who's got tickets?

angles.name: Scottish Star in London
angles.copy: Our very own Lewis Capaldi is set to headline two massive nights at London's Hyde Park next weekend! Go on, Lewis!

moments.title: Sophie Ellis-Bextor at GuilFest
moments.blurb: GuilFest returns to Stoke Park this weekend, July 4-5, with Sophie Ellis-Bextor headlining the main stage on Saturday.

angles.name: Kitchen Disco Live
angles.copy: Sophie Ellis-Bextor is headlining GuilFest today! Get ready for some serious kitchen disco vibes in Stoke Park.

angles.name: Festival Fun
angles.copy: GuilFest is back this weekend with Sophie Ellis-Bextor leading the charge! Who's heading to Guildford for the music?

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: Birmingham's Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival takes place next weekend, July 10-12, in Moseley Park, celebrating innovative UK and international acts.

angles.name: Birmingham Beats
angles.copy: Next weekend, Birmingham is grooving! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival brings three days of incredible music to Moseley Park.

angles.name: Weekend Grooves
angles.copy: Get ready for a soulful weekend! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival kicks off next Friday. Who's joining the party?

moments.title: Al Jardine (The Beach Boys) turns 84
moments.blurb: Al Jardine, co-founder and rhythm guitarist of The Beach Boys, celebrates his 84th birthday today, July 4th.

angles.name: Beach Boy Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to Al Jardine, legendary co-founder of The Beach Boys! What's your favourite Beach Boys classic?

angles.name: Surf Rock Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 84th birthday to The Beach Boys' Al Jardine! Still making waves with that iconic sound.

moments.title: Huey Lewis turns 76
moments.blurb: American singer Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, celebrates his 76th birthday tomorrow, July 5th.

angles.name: It's a New Day
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the one and only Huey Lewis turns 76! What's your go-to Huey Lewis and the News track to get you going?

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to the fantastic Huey Lewis! Still 'The Heart of Rock & Roll' to us.

moments.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on Monday, July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! Ringo Starr turns 86 on Monday. What's your favourite Beatles song featuring Ringo's iconic drumming?

angles.name: All-Starr Birthday
angles.copy: On Monday, we're celebrating the 86th birthday of a true music icon, Ringo Starr! Send him your best wishes!

moments.title: Beck turns 56
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning alternative rock musician Beck celebrates his 56th birthday on Tuesday, July 8th.

angles.name: Indie Icon
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the genre-bending genius, Beck, on Tuesday! What's your favourite era of his incredible music?

angles.name: Loser to Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Beck's 56th birthday this Tuesday! From 'Loser' to 'Dreams', he's constantly reinvented his sound.

moments.title: Courtney Love turns 62
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman and rock icon Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on Wednesday, July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the one and only Courtney Love on Wednesday! What's your favourite Hole track?

angles.name: 90s Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a fierce 62nd birthday to Courtney Love! The ultimate 90s rock legend.

moments.title: Jack White turns 51
moments.blurb: The White Stripes frontman and prolific rock musician Jack White celebrates his 51st birthday on Wednesday, July 9th.

angles.name: Garage Rock King
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible Jack White on Wednesday! What's your favourite project from the rock innovator?

angles.name: White Stripes Era
angles.copy: Celebrating Jack White's 51st this Wednesday! Still rocking harder than anyone. What's your go-to White Stripes anthem?

moments.title: Suzanne Vega turns 67
moments.blurb: Acclaimed singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', celebrates her 67th birthday on Friday, July 11th.

angles.name: 80s Folk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the brilliant Suzanne Vega this Friday! 'Luka' or 'Tom's Diner' – which is your favourite?

angles.name: Storyteller's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to the poetic Suzanne Vega on Friday! Her songs are timeless.

moments.title: Richie Sambora turns 67
moments.blurb: Former Bon Jovi guitarist and rock legend Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday on Friday, July 11th.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the incredible Richie Sambora this Friday! What's your favourite Bon Jovi guitar solo?

angles.name: Bon Jovi Legend
angles.copy: Raise a glass to Richie Sambora, turning 67 on Friday! The man behind so many classic Bon Jovi riffs.

moments.title: Roger McGuinn (The Byrds) turns 84
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, co-founder and lead guitarist of the influential folk-rock band The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday on Sunday, July 13th.

angles.name: Folk-Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the legendary Roger McGuinn of The Byrds this Sunday! His Rickenbacker sound defined an era.

angles.name: Byrds Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 84th birthday to Roger McGuinn! Thank you for the timeless music with The Byrds.

moments.title: Scottish Schools on Summer Holidays
moments.blurb: Schools across Scotland officially broke up for their summer holidays on Thursday, July 2nd, with many families now enjoying their break.

angles.name: Summer's Here!
angles.copy: The school bells have rung for summer in Scotland! Who's already enjoying their well-deserved break?

angles.name: Holiday Vibes
angles.copy: Scottish schools are officially on summer holiday! Wishing everyone a fantastic break filled with sunshine and fun.

moments.title: The Open Championship Practice Days Begin
moments.blurb: The build-up to The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale begins with practice days starting on Sunday, July 12th, ahead of the main tournament from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Stage
angles.copy: The Open Championship practice days kick off this Sunday at Royal Birkdale! The world's best golfers are preparing for glory.

angles.name: Road to Birkdale
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is buzzing! Practice rounds for The 154th Open begin on Sunday. Who are you tipping for the Claret Jug?
